game_metadata.title: 31st of February
game_metadata.subtitle: Success Probability 0%
game_metadata.description: A solo glitch-loop RPG played through a zine and future companion app.

attributes.label: MSK
attributes.description: Performing expected behaviours, social scripts, and facade maintenance.

attributes.label: SNS
attributes.description: Processing noise, movement, overstimulation, and shifting focus.

attributes.label: LOG
attributes.description: Systems thinking, routines, literal interpretation, structured reasoning.

vital_signs.label: Battery
vital_signs.description: Remaining energy. At 0, the current loop phase ends immediately.

vital_signs.label: Stability
vital_signs.description: Proximity to breaking the simulation pattern.

vital_signs.label: SIP
vital_signs.description: Moments of agency and self-directed action.

events.prompt: Alarm rings at the wrong time.
Coffee machine stalls mid-brew.
A neighbour waves too enthusiastically.
Your reflection lags behind your movement.
A bus arrives early for the first time ever.
A stranger asks if you remember them.
Your phone displays yesterday's notifications.
A bird lands and stares directly at you.
The lift stops on a floor that doesn't exist.
A coworker greets you by the wrong name.
The streetlights flicker in a pattern.
A child points at you and laughs.
A shop door refuses to open for you.
A dog barks exactly three times as you pass.
Your shoelace unravels on its own.
A cyclist nearly clips you, then apologises in slow motion.
A billboard displays your face.
A busker plays a tune you recognise from a dream.
A vending machine dispenses two items.
A stranger hands you a folded note.
A pigeon walks in perfect sync with you.
A car alarm triggers as you look at it.
A street sign is spelled differently today.
A shop assistant insists you were just there.
A gust of wind knocks something from your pocket.
A pedestrian stops and blocks your path.
A taxi splashes water onto your shoes.
A cyclist circles you once before leaving.
A bus driver refuses to make eye contact.
A child drops a toy at your feet.
A stranger compliments your shoes.
A street performer freezes when you look.
A shop window shows a different outfit on you.
A dog follows you for one block.
A cyclist shouts a warning too late.
A stranger asks for directions you don't know.
A bus stop display glitches.
A shop door opens before you touch it.
A pedestrian bumps into you without noticing.
A car slows down beside you.
A street vendor calls you Candidate.
A pigeon drops a feather at your feet.
A stranger hands you a flyer with no text.
A busker stops playing as you pass.
A cyclist rings their bell repeatedly.
A shop assistant stares too long.
A pedestrian mirrors your steps.
A car honks exactly twice.
A street sign rotates slightly.
A stranger whispers something you can't hear.
A bus arrives empty.
A dog growls softly as you pass.
A cyclist swerves around you dramatically.
A shop window shows a different weather.
A pedestrian drops their bag.
A car door opens suddenly.
A street vendor offers you something for free.
A pigeon lands on your shoulder briefly.
A stranger asks if you're ready.
A busker plays a discordant note.
A cyclist stops to adjust their wheel.
A shop assistant gives you the wrong change.
A pedestrian walks backwards.
A car's headlights flicker.
A street sign is upside down.
A stranger hands you a pen.
A dog barks once, loudly.
A cyclist drops something as they pass.
A shop window shows a glitching reflection.
A pedestrian waves at you.
A car alarm stops abruptly.
A street vendor calls you by name.
A pigeon blocks your path.
A stranger asks the date.
A busker plays a familiar melody.
A cyclist nearly crashes.
A shop assistant asks if you're looping.
A pedestrian stares at the sky.
A car slows to a crawl beside you.
A street sign flickers between names.
A stranger hands you a blank card.
A dog sits and watches you.
A cyclist shouts something unintelligible.
A shop window shows static.
A pedestrian drops a key.
A car door locks loudly.
A street vendor offers you a discount.
A pigeon flies directly at you.
A stranger asks if you're lost.
A busker stops mid-song.
A cyclist circles you twice.
A shop assistant asks if you're the Candidate.
A pedestrian walks through you in a crowd.
A car's engine revs aggressively.
A street sign displays your name.
A stranger hands you a folded map.
A dog refuses to move until you pass.
A cyclist drops a note.
A shop window shows you smiling when you aren't.
The OS speaks directly to you.

log_file_00: You must attend an interview today.
You must be what they want.

world_frame.system: The OS rewards script-perfect behaviour and punishes deviation.
world_frame.truth: Glitching is evidence of being real. Destabilisation is the path to escape.
